reviews.review_title: Brilliant game, would like to see more!
reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely amazing, it resembles H3VR exactly. The ballistics are amazing, the variety of guns are amazing with the loads of attachments, you can also see the information of the caliber of the weapon, also the controller hands genuinely are so amazing along with the new multiplayer! One thing i would love to see is an option to put any type of ammunition into a gun that wasn't compatible with that ammunition which would be an amazing feature to mess around with and have fun with. (Example: putting a 50ae round into an 9mm pistol)
It would be nice to get a colt 45 single action army and a Luger PO8
I like the various guns my favorite being the brown beast and flintlock. All i want to say to the developers of the game is to add a blunderbuss and possibly a nock/volley gun

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Glad you like the older guns - I will see if I can get a good model for a blunderbuss or nock gun somewhere!

reviews.review_description:
This game is fantastic closest to real live gun shooting all that’s missing would be the feel of the recoil. Great weapon selection with accessories long range , short range shotgun ut has it all. If I had one negative quirk it would be the size and color of the red dot sights , but all in all I give it a rating of A+++
Can’t wait for the next update and upgrade. 
     Thanks 😎🦅🇺🇸

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind review! Very glad you like my game. You are right that some of the red dots are oversize for clarity - I will look at reducing them a bit. If you have any other comments I would love to hear them, here or at the game Discord!
For a recoil experience the game will work with the ForceTube series of gunstocks!

reviews.review_title: awesome game with very low price
reviews.review_description: I like this games. I didn't know about this game even through searching through meta games but I found this game through reddit. I do hope we have a longer range up to 800m or 1000m.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, and for the suggestion! A 1K range should be doable, and I'll start working to put that in!

reviews.review_description: this game is great, everyone likes it! you have a huge community and I really thank you from the bottom of my heart for creating this game and for not giving up when you were creating it, you really have a lot of knowledge when it comes to programming! things I would like to see added: Multiplayer mode possible the ability to shoot at each other, this multiplayer feature just needs to be added, even if it is difficult, you can do it! I know it may be very complicated, but inviting people from meta horizon can definitely be done! you can do it! 2. more guns, e.g. Glock 19 and some other cool ones 3. improving the sounds 4. improving the explosion when you shoot the weapon, improving the explosion at the end of the barrel 5. fixing the 22lr not to fire on INF km and other weapons as well 6. improving the code so that there are no errors in all cases.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review - I'm happy you like the game! Comments: - I would like to add multiplayer but at the moment it's just been too hard to do, so I won't promise anything there. - The Glock 19 is definitely doable, and I'll add that to the list. - Sound rework may come in the future, but not soon. - Muzzle blasts will be tweaked a bit in the next update and I'll look at how they could be made more realistic. - 22lr: I'm not sure I understood this, if there is an error I haven't seen, but the realistic max range of 22lr is just over 2000 yards (although with terrible dispersion and zero penetration). If I misunderstood, you can edit your review text to let me know or write on reddit-gunsgame. - Code improvements are something I work constantly on, so each update will be at least a little better! Thank you again; I appreciate all your ideas and comments.

reviews.review_description:
Love everything about this as a standalone game and the only thing I'd like added is the ability to increase smooth turn speed as it's rather slow currently and I don't like to use snap turnIng. 

Weapons feel good, graphics work well for what it is and the price point is incredible. 
If you like messing with guns and shooting ranges buy it now. 

If you want to set up a target range you can move and place targets however you like which is also a bonus, would be great if you could save placements though. 

Well done Developer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your nice review! I'll look at the turn rate and see if I can increase it. Target position saving may be more complex but I'll look into it! EDIT: Turn rate is now increased.

reviews.review_title: Could be better, but 100% worth it atm
reviews.review_description:
So far this is the best quest alternative to H3VR I've seen. The graphics are cartoonish but the guns work pretty realistically. 

Some things could definitely be improved though, the holster system especially. Not sure if it's a bug exactly, but if you holster a weapon and then switch the gun category on the table you got the weapon from, it makes the holster inaccessible and makes that weapon invisible until you switch back to that category on the table you got the weapon from. Not a major deal, but it brings up that the holsters are extremely limiting at only two weapon holsters. (as far as I can tell) Something like the H3VR holsters would work much better for a game like this, especially for the magazines. In the game's current state, if you pick up more than three guns, you have to deal with multiple different magazines in the same holster which can make that holster kinda unusable. I'd much prefer a spawnlock mechanism like in H3VR, where you get to choose what magazines are in which holster. In general the game needs more slots to put things. 

Also the one handed reload system is really cool, I've never seen it in a vr game yet, but I always thought it would be really nice to be able to prime the hammer on a revolver by pulling the joystick back. 

As for bugs I've seen, it hasn't been too bad. There's an option to disable joystick movement, which makes both joysticks stop working, but if you click the left joystick down to start the timer, it for some reason restores functionality to that joystick, but the right joystick stays off. Not a big bug by any means, it even makes it easier for me since I only wanted snap turning off, but they should definitely be separate settings. Also I'm not sure if this is intended, but my left controller cannot grab things from far away like the right can. 

I gotta say, the guns do feel very nice to shoot. They feel like they respond how you'd expect, and overall are enjoyable to use. The reloading could be a bit improved, I'd love the ability to pull the mag out with my left hand rather than using the mag release on every gun. because a lot of these weapons do not have drop free mags. This is minor, but an ejection rod on the revolvers would be really nice, or at least have the game make you tilt the cylinders to dump the empty casings out rather than them just falling out as soon as you hit B.

I know this is very nitpicky, but this is like every thought I've had about this game. Sorry for making so many H3VR comparisons as well.

Edit: after playing a bit more I've got a couple things to add. 

Shotgun pumping is extremely finicky, and almost impossible to do consistently without using the joystick. I'd also love to see shells eject from the break action shotguns, rather than disappearing. The shotgun loading is ok, I'd definitely prefer single shells rather than just one pile that fills the entire tube mag, and magically reduces to 2 shells for the break action. 

It does kinda remind me of those goofy super shotgun reloads though. 

Also the walls in the barn seem to just be for show because I can walk through all of them. And procedural generation would be really cool to see in the barn, as well as just a general size increase. 

That's it I promise.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review, and the detailed comments - very helpful! Any comparison with H3VR is nice, because that game is just fantastic and the gold standard for any weapon handling in VR. Now to the details!
Holsters - the selection/disabling bug will be fixed in the next update in a week or two. I know the ammo handling is simplified, and have been considering a more realistic version (selectable). There are also two more holster slots by the sides of your head.
Barn walls - the see-through bug will be fixed in next update, and larger hallways may be coming in the future.
Revolvers - Will work on a better ejection simulation, but don't know when it will appear as I must test it much more - same for mag grabs.
Shotguns - Planning a future switchable mag system for some guns which would include single shot loading for shotguns. The shells really should eject, and I'd like to hear more about when that does not happen as well as the pumping issue, if you have the time - here or on reddit-Gunsgame! Also if you have any guns you would like to see added to the game. Thanks again for the comments - I'm very happy when someone likes what I've been building!

reviews.review_description:
Cartooon polygon style Gun simulator.

LOTS of guns for you to try… there’s is a lot of weapons from hand guns to sniper rifles and assault weapons

There is various moving targets and breast for you to try out the weapons.

Sounds are good

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review - I'm happy you like my game!

reviews.review_description: Great gun range simulator for a low price. Excited to see where this game goes with more development. Would be fun to see multiplayer added in the future!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I'm glad you like my game - multiplayer is a complex thing to add so I won't make any promises there but there will certainly be more updates!

reviews.review_description: The graphics are simple, but I like how the rifles and shotguns feel with my VR gunstock. I enjoy trying to speed shoot with the bolt action, and testing the different guns.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! Appreciate the feedback!

reviews.review_description: Simplistic graphics, no blood and gore, a rare change in a game of today, especially a shooter, but such a variety of targets and things to shoot at keeps it refreshing.  The weapon physics are quite good and the guns feel ok however it would be nice to have the ability to reload through movement actions.  And I can this as a good one on one multiplayer.  I look forward to the updates on this one.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much - I'm happy you like it! Manual mag grabs is planned for a later update, hopefully during the spring.

reviews.review_description:
Now I know nothing about guns, I shoot a lot in vr, but have no clue what I’m using, this is a great way to learn and shoot some amazing guns.
No story as such, just shooting different targets, but yes I had awesome fun.
It definitely has that one more go feel to it.
Graphics are not too bad either, Quest 3 update would be incredible but at the price point I think it works well.
Well done to the dev.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Much appreciated.

reviews.review_description: Good for practice shooting, can help if you want to hunt, lots of different things to do.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I'm glad you like the game!

reviews.review_description:
Can you please add the ak 12 with the m3o2 and micro m1 tall red site 

And the game is fun but to the trailer it needs some music and so the game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your rating, and for the suggestions! AK12 is definitely doable, so I'll add that to the list. The M3O2 I'm not familiar with (unless it's the MO2 wider-diameter red dot, where I'll add something similar soon). Please drop a link, here or at r/gunsgame on reddit, if it's something else! Music is also a good idea - I'll look into that!

reviews.review_description: The game is very fun I don't get bored but I would like more frequent updates and I also ask you to put new scopes and grips...last thinks Is add the M14.thanks

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review! More scopes and grips will be coming, and I will look for a model of the M14 to see if it is feasible!

reviews.review_description: I assume that you found my review on the demo

developer_response.body: Thank you for this review, as well as the one on the demo! I'm glad you like it!

reviews.review_description: You should add a functional musket to the game that has the full reloading routine.i’d like to go back in the Nepolionic times to have the OG musket.(preferably the ammo that was used in blood and iron Roblox if you know that game tho)but yea I would love a musket in the game with its full reloading routine and I wanted to say your game is so much fun and can’t wait for more!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review - I'm happy you enjoy it! The musket is a good idea, and I will put that on the list to start looking for a model for it! It may take a bit of time before I figure out the reloading, but I'll test Blood & Iron to compare.

reviews.review_description:
I was pretty surprised by how much I enjoy this one… I’ve played every FPS there is to play, but this one tends to be my 2nd or 3rd favorite, after Breachers & Ghosts of Tabor. Much simpler than those 2 other games but it’s not trying to compete… it’s a fun target shooter, plain and simple, with perfect gun mechanics and fun mini games. 

Seriously, this might be the BEST VALUE on the entire store at $7.  Knowing what I know now I’d have predicted it’s be $19.99 or $14.99. $7 is an absolute STEAL. 
Please keep the updates coming! Also adding more firearms would be very welcome as well lol.  If you were to release a DLC that offered 5-10 new guns, I’d gladly pay another $5-$7. Keep up the great work… if you ended up including 30-40 firearms into the game, plus mods & attachments to fool around with, “GUNS” would certainly rank in the top 10 or 20 offered in AppLab AND the Main Store.


UPDATE JUNE 1, 2023:
Just keeps getting better and better. Promises made and promises being kept. Love the addition of ak47 & the silenced pistol. Also loving how the scarecrows attack now! Pretty cool lol. Keep going man… this game could really turn into something special if it ends up with a whole slew of firearms. 
Only wish I have is for the ability to add ATTACHMENTS.  Suppressors, scopes, sights, grenade launcher attachment for AK, etc…. And the ability to save your favorite builds.  Otherwise, keep up the great work! 

P.S. The constant updates are much appreciated! Updates are rarely just simple bug fixes… usually there’s something of real substance added, which makes me really look forward to each update.

P.S.S. Im pretty bummed this game hasn’t received the love or attention it deserves. This is better than 90% of games offered on the MAIN STORE, let alone AppLab. Not like the price is gonna break the bank.


UPDATE JUNE 27, 2023
I really like where you’re headed.  Being able to fully kit a weapon out to wazoo and also the ability to save favorites would be fantastic.  Honestly, your doing everything I’ve already asked for and then some…. My biggest wish would probably be more rifles… combat rifles, like AK’s, not sniper.  If the game were to get bigger, I’d really want co-op modes, or a pvp mode…. It’s a shame this doesn’t get the love.  
Do you have a discord channel? If so I’d love to discuss suggestions further.  All I can say now is, 
THANK YOU FOR THE CONSTANT UPDATES, AND GOOD LUCK. You really deserve some love and recognition for this.


UPDATE 1/25/24
It’s a dang shame this game hasn’t received more attention. The constant updates with new weapons/scopes/attachments being added is top notch. Kinda mad something this high quality is ignored

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! New shotgun models added now, and look out for more combat rifles in a while!

reviews.review_description: I love it but the movement is buggy the ammo is buggy and on a table when you use a gun and stop and then you try to spawn it again and it doesn’t spawn. Overall you should fix it and can you add a kar98k

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review, and thank you for alerting me to this! The shotgun ammo bug and the spawn bug are corrected in the version released yesterday (0.786). If you could send more details of the movement bug I'm grateful, here, on Reddit-Gunsgame or on Discord. The Kar98k should be doable, but it may take some time because I need to adjust the models first!
